ideas.name: AI Customer Assistant
ideas.desc: AI-powered customer service assistant for inquiries, knowledge search, escalation routing, and satisfaction surveys. Handles common questions, searches knowledge bases, and routes complex issues with full context.

ideas.name: Sales Coach
ideas.desc: AI-powered sales coaching with call reviews, skill assessments, coaching plans, and performance dashboards. Reviews recorded calls, identifies coaching opportunities, and tracks rep improvement over time.

ideas.name: Speech to CRM
ideas.desc: Transcribes sales calls, extracts entities, maps to CRM fields, and previews record updates. Automatically captures meeting notes, action items, and key data points into CRM records.

ideas.name: Email Drafting
ideas.desc: AI-powered email drafting for outreach, follow-ups, proposals, and template management with personalization. Generates context-aware emails from templates with smart personalization.

ideas.name: Cross-Selling Opportunities
ideas.desc: Identifies cross-selling opportunities via product affinity analysis, customer ownership mapping, and revenue impact projections. Surfaces upsell opportunities based on purchase patterns and product gaps.

ideas.name: Customer 360
ideas.desc: Unified customer profiles merging CRM, support, and billing data with health scores and next-best-action recommendations. Provides a single view of each customer across all touchpoints.

ideas.name: IT Ticket Management
ideas.desc: IT ticket management with dashboards, priority assignment, SLA tracking, and resolution reporting. Auto-categorizes tickets, assigns priority, and tracks resolution against SLA targets.

ideas.name: Procurement Support
ideas.desc: Procurement support for requisition tracking, contract lookups, supplier performance, and budget checks. Streamlines purchase requests with automated approval routing and spend analysis.

ideas.name: Product Reference
ideas.desc: Product catalog with feature comparison, pricing tiers, and compatibility checking. Enables sales and support teams to instantly look up product details, compare options, and verify compatibility.

ideas.name: Triage Bot
ideas.desc: Inquiry classification, routing, priority assessment, and handoff summary generation. Classifies inbound inquiries, determines urgency, routes to the right team, and prepares handoff summaries.
